SEARCH
Package gov.cdc.izgateway.ads

Interface FileSender

All Known Implementing Classes:
AzureBlobStorageSender, DEXStorageSender, RestfulFileSender
public interface FileSender
Contract for Blob Storage sender interface to enable reuse of this with other blob stores (e.g., Azure, S3 bucket).
